title: From latent bandgap to measured edge in HgCdTe: distributional observation operators and structural identifiability

conflict_of_interest.named_statement: The author declares a commercial interest in infrared photodetector modeling and consulting through Brooks Photonics.

data_availability.named: The repository-generated data that support the findings of this study, together with the analysis code, immutable validation records, tests, and deterministic figure-generation scripts, will be openly available in a DOI-issuing archive. The persistent identifier will be inserted before final submission. Restricted publisher PDFs are not redistributed; source-conditioned quantities are identified by DOI and accompanied by provenance and transformation records.
data_availability.anonymous: The repository-generated data and analysis code will be deposited in a DOI-issuing archive. Access details are withheld in this review version to preserve double-anonymous review and will be supplied at revision. Restricted publisher PDFs are not redistributed.

unresolved_submission_blockers: telephone number if requested by the submission system
